name: Southwest Rapid Rewards® Plus Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 50,000 bonus Rapid Rewards points after spending $1,000 in first 3 months (worth ~$745 toward Southwest flights at 1.49¢/point)

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Points
annual_credits.description: 3,000 Rapid Rewards anniversary points each year (worth ~$45 at 1.5¢/point)

other_benefits.name: Complimentary Boarding
other_benefits.description: Complimentary standard seat within 48 hours of departure when available

other_benefits.name: Earn Qualifying Points
other_benefits.description: Card spend counts toward Southwest A-List status (1 qualifying point per $1 on Southwest purchases)

notes: Entry-level Southwest card. The 3,000 anniversary points (~$45 value) covers about 45% of the $99 AF. As of 2025, the $75 annual travel credit was removed from the Plus card. Better for occasional Southwest flyers. The $1,000 min spend for welcome bonus is very low.
